articles.title: The Next Swan: Frank Ramsey, Variable Hypotheticals, and the Bet on Induction
articles.summary:

articles.title: Mental causation is not load-bearing
articles.summary: In philosophy of mind, "mental causation" means mental entities have causal effects, especially physical ones.
